name: typescript-refactor-public
description: Marketplace for the typescript-refactor plugin for Claude Code.

plugins.name: typescript-refactor
plugins.description: JavaScript-to-TypeScript refactor planning specialist, running on the session model (always the strongest available Claude). Dispatches a full team of 7 read-only senior planner agents in sequential waves (inventory, target architecture, migration slicing, verification) to produce an evidence-tagged phased migration plan, scrum-master-format per-story markdown files, Mermaid dependency DAG, and dispatch wave plan. Integrates directly with the scrum-master plugin for execution handoff. Grounded in the 19-file TypeScript knowledge vault plus cross-language migration doctrine. Current TS defaults: tsgo (TypeScript 7) as the primary typecheck gate, strict + noUncheckedIndexedAccess + exactOptionalPropertyTypes, verbatimModuleSyntax, erasable-syntax-only, Zod at boundaries, branded types, Drizzle/Prisma, Fastify/Hono, Vitest, pnpm + turborepo, type-coverage CI gates.
